intended_use: The Momentum Spine app is an optical contour sensing mobile application intended to quantify asymmetries, assess body angles and curve progression related to postural asymmetries, including scoliosis.
intended_use_full: The Momentum Spine app is an optical contour sensing mobile application intended to quantify asymmetries, assess body angles and curve progression related to postural asymmetries, including scoliosis. The device is available directly to lay users (Over-the-Counter) and may also be prescribed for use by physicians. The device is intended for use in patients 8 years and older.
ground_truth: Cobb angle derived from X-ray (radiograph) taken on the same day as app prediction
other_metrics: AI algorithm prediction within 10 degrees of X-ray derived Cobb angle (ground truth); Software unit testing: 87% code coverage (PASS); Software system-level testing: PASS; Software integration testing: PASS; Usability: 15/15 lay users passed safe-use test; 15/15 healthcare professionals passed safe-use test; Ease-of-use survey: 3/3 user face intuitiveness, 2.8/3 ease to understand instructions, 2.9/3 instructions clarity
